title: Mechanical Wonders
description: Mechanical Wonders is a modpack using the create mods and its addons with some other mods like farmer's delight!
body:
!V 1.0.0 DOES NOT WORK![Version 1.0.2 requires ~15GB of RAM] Mechanical Wonders is a modpack built around the Create mod and its addons, focused on mechanical automation and creative building. It adds tools, machines, and blocks to make building, crafting, and moving items easier and more efficient.

Key features:

Mechanical Systems – Gears, belts, shafts, and pulleys for building machines and moving parts.

Addon Support – Works with Create mod expansions for extra machines, vehicles, and automation options.

Crafting and Automation – Machines and tools that simplify production and processing.

Blocks and Decoration – Functional and decorative blocks that fit well into automated builds.

Item and Fluid Transport – Pipes, belts, and systems for moving resources efficiently.

The modpack also uses the farmers delight mods aswell as mods to use the create mod with it.
